scenario: Linehaul + fuel surcharge breakdown — requires normalization for comparison
subject: RE: Flatbed Dallas to Atlanta — Our Quote
body:
Jillian,

Here's our pricing for the Dallas-Atlanta flatbed:

Linehaul: $2,400
Fuel surcharge (18%): $432
Tarping fee: $75
---
Total: $2,907

Available for April 15 pickup. Standard transit 2 days.

Eagle Carriers Inc.
Chris Murphy
rates@eaglecarriers.com
(404) 555-0228
